[Quit.]
I find your existence to be most fascinating.

You give me hope, even though as a scientist
I have no scientific basis for the feeling.

And that hope is that you'll be able to
get us through this somehow.

As such, I have something for you. I don't want to have 
any regrets should this be our final conversation.

Do you remember my research on phase electron interference?
This program is a prototype packed with the most recent research data.

Even after you disappeared, I continued my research diligently
in preparation for the day you might return.
